title: Rain on the Ground
story: The weather is bad today. Black clouds sit low over the town, and a storm is coming. The wind sings in the trees. Rain falls and falls; the ground turns to mud. Players slip and slide everywhere — their shirts are wet, their shoes are heavy. "Will they cancel the match?" asks Sanae under her umbrella. "No," says Roberto. "They will continue. Rain is a good teacher." Then, suddenly, the rain stops. The sun begins to shine, and the ground slowly gets dry. Football weather again!

words.def: how it is outside — sun, rain, wind, hot or cold.
words.ex: The weather is bad for football today.
words.mn: 聊天万能开场:Nice weather!(天气不错)。⚠️和 whether(是否)同音。

words.def: a white or gray thing in the sky; rain comes from it.
words.ex: Black clouds mean rain is coming.
words.mn: 云存储、云计算的'云'就是 cloud——你的照片存在'云'上。cloudy=多云的。

words.def: very bad weather with strong wind and much rain.
words.ex: The storm breaks trees on the street.
words.mn: 头脑风暴=brainstorm,就是脑子里刮 storm。

words.ex: The wind takes the ball away.
words.mn: window(窗)开头就是 wind——窗就是给风开的洞。windy=刮风的。

words.def: soft wet earth on the ground.
words.ex: His white shirt is brown with mud.
words.mn: 谐音辅助(先读三遍 /mʌd/):'马德'——马蹄踩出来的烂泥。muddy=泥泞的。

words.def: to fall or almost fall on something wet or smooth.
words.ex: He slips on the wet grass.
words.mn: sl- 家族都很'滑':slip 滑倒、slide 滑行、slippery 滑的。拖鞋=slippers(容易打滑的鞋)。

words.def: to move easily over something smooth; also the thing children play on in a park.
words.ex: He slides on the mud to stop the ball.
words.mn: 滑梯就叫 slide;PPT 的一页也叫 slide(一张张'滑'过去)。足球铲球=sliding tackle。

words.def: with water on it or in it; not dry.
words.ex: Their shirts are wet from the rain.
words.mn: 和 water(水)同一家。湿纸巾包装上就写着 wet tissue。

words.def: with no water; to take the water out of something.
words.ex: The ground gets dry in the sun.
words.mn: 吹风机=hair dryer(把头发弄 dry 的机器)。和 wet 一对反义词。

words.def: to give out light, like the sun.
words.ex: The sun shines after the storm.
words.mn: sunshine=阳光。shiny=亮闪闪的。Rise and shine!=太阳晒屁股啦,起床!

words.def: what you stand on outside; the earth under your feet.
words.ex: The ball stops dead on the wet ground.
words.mn: 足球场=football ground,操场=playground(play+ground 玩耍的地面)。

words.def: to say that something planned will not happen.
words.ex: They do not cancel the match.
words.mn: 手机 App 里的'取消'按钮就是 Cancel,你天天见。航班取消=flight canceled。

words.def: to keep doing something; to not stop.
words.ex: The game continues in the rain.
words.mn: 游戏死了以后屏幕上问你:CONTINUE?(继续吗)——就是它。

words.def: a thing you hold over your head so the rain does not make you wet.
words.ex: Sanae watches the game under her umbrella.
words.mn: 词源:umbra=影子(拉丁语)→制造影子的小东西=伞。最早是遮太阳的。

words.def: very fast, when you do not think it will happen.
words.mn: sudden(突然的)+ly(副词尾巴)。故事书里的转折之王:Suddenly,...(突然……)。
